rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relationship to Educ. Code §21.458, which governs school district mentor teacher assignments and qualifications.
quote: Sec. 21.458. MENTORS. (a) Except as provided by Subsection (a-2), each school district may assign a mentor teacher to each classroom teacher who has less than two years of teaching experience in the subject or grade level to which the teacher is assigned.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and mentor teacher statute.
